basic_details.short_information: Visvesvaraya National Institute of Technology Nagpur (VNIT Nagpur) Recruitment 2026: Visvesvaraya National Institute of Technology Nagpur is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 4 Project Associate posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

content_sections.heading: VNIT Nagpur Project Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the VNIT Nagpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download VNIT Nagpur Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: VNIT Nagpur Project Associate Vacancy Details 2026
VNIT Nagpur Project Associate Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: 4-year B.Tech./Bachelor's Degree in Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE), Computer Science & Engineering (CSE), or an equivalent/related discipline from a recognized University/Institute with First Class or a minimum CGPA of 6.5/10 (or equivalent).

content_sections.heading: VNIT Nagpur Project Associate Application Fee
VNIT Nagpur Project Associate Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: VNIT Nagpur Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
VNIT Nagpur Project Associate Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for VNIT Nagpur Project Associate Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: VNIT Nagpur Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the VNIT Nagpur Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview, and the interview is scheduled for 20 July 2026. Candidates should report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a 4-year B.Tech./Bachelor's Degree in Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE) or Computer Science & Engineering (CSE), or an equivalent/related discipline with First Class or a minimum CGPA of 6.5/10.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Project Associate position at VNIT Nagpur.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for VNIT Nagpur Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies (ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates if any), and a duly filled application form if required.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview for VNIT Nagpur Project Associate to be held?
faq.answer: The exact venue details will be available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to check the official website for precise location information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at VNIT Nagpur.
